raw_consumer_statement:
American Express c/o XXXX On XX/XX/year>, I contacted XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX because I wanted to cancel my hotel reservation because of a sick family member. 
XXXX XXXX directed me to the XXXX website where I put in a refund request through their online portal. I was unable to obtain a copy of the request because it was done through their portal. 
XXXX informed that I could get a refund due to my family members medical issues. 
I asked XXXX if I needed to check into the hotel and XXXX told me that if he couldnt get me a refund then the hotel would only charge me for XXXX night and refund me the rest of my money. 
I would have never given the hotel {$930.00} dollars if I wasnt led to believe that I couldnt get a refund. I dont have money like that to give away. 
On XX/XX/year>, I called the Double tree Hotel and informed them that I would not be checking in and I was told that they could cancel my reservation but couldnt refund me my money because I had booked my reservations through a XXXX party which was XXXX. 
I was told by the XXXX representative that if I didnt check in that I would only be charged for XXXX night according to our policy, but I would need to contact XXXX for my remaining balance. 
On or about XX/XX/year>, I contacted American Express and was told to call the Double Tree Hotel and request a copy of my receipt for payment. I was told by the American Express agent that the receipt would show whether the XXXX had been paid because XXXX has a history of keeping people money. 
I was told by the Hotel that they couldnt provide me a receipt because I booked the reservation through XXXX and since I never checked in that the money hadnt been released to them from XXXX. 
On XX/XX/year>, XXXX XXXX emailed me with an update confirming my XX/XX/year>, refund request stating, were still working on your refund request with Double Tree by XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. 
On XX/XX/year>, I received an email from XXXX XXXX from XXXX XXXX XXXX stating that the Hotel would not be able to refund me my money. 
It appears that XXXX XXXX is attempting to commit XXXX. ( Please see their determination letter ) XXXX states that I called the hotel on XX/XX/year>, which is not true because I didnt arrive in XXXX XXXX XX/XX/year>. ( Please see my XXXX confirmation ). 
XXXX XXXX states that I didnt contact them until XX/XX/year>, for a refund request which is totally untrue. 
It appears that the XXXX XXXX is committing fraudulent activity, and I would like an investigation to be conducted on my behalf because the information in their documentation is not accurate. 
I would like you to please to refund me my {$930.00} because I was told that I would receive a refund. This situation is causing me financial hardship, stress, and anxiety.
